data.body: Epic d195 (deadsmooth-provincial-shrew) COMPLETE 2026-07-15: all six children closed signed, changes 700/701/706/707/708 merged on main through Gerrit (LLM-Review+1 + Verified+1 each). Discovered bugs filed: ba85 (novelty eval not live-runnable), c810 (venv-inside-repo symbol misclassification). Q2 items (plan-v2 threshold replay + ac_unverifiable floor sub-grade) remain held pending operator approval. Meta-observation for calibration 3: implementing this epic took the coach story 11 review rounds and the floor story 10 — all blocks valid but overwhelmingly terminal-detail specification demands (exact signatures, exact oracles), fresh each round; strong first-hand evidence for the plan-v2 segmented replay.
